method: Character 5-gram Jaccard overlap between each MetaMirage prompt and a 30-probe MMLU-style sample spanning 6 subject areas. Identical or paraphrased questions would give Jaccard > 0.5; thematic similarity (same domain, different question) typically gives 0.05-0.15; truly distinct prompts give < 0.05.
interpretation: Maximum task-level overlap with the MMLU proxy is below the exact-match / paraphrase threshold (0.5). Mean overlap < 0.10 indicates broad thematic distinctness. The benchmark is not a rephrasing of MMLU items. Genre-level contamination (familiarity with the trap *type*) cannot be ruled out at the prompt-text level — that is a structural limitation of any new benchmark drawing on standard reasoning fallacies.

top_5_overlap_pairs.closest_match: What is the capital of Bhutan?
What is the probability of rolling a 6 on a fair die?
What is the SI unit of electric current?
What is the SI unit of electric current?
What is the function of the mitochondria?
